hypothesis: #9 STRC Synthetic Peptide Hydrogel HTC — Phase 3b full-construct validation
purpose: Phase 3b fuses the Phase 3 winning GOLD-zone tails back to the Phase 2 RADA16-WH2 scaffold architecture. Tests whether isolated-tail TMEM145 binding (ipTM 0.63-0.68) is preserved when the tail is attached to the WH2 actin-binder N-terminus + RADA16 self-assembling scaffold. Also tests whether extended tail disturbs WH2 actin engagement from the far N-terminus.

rada16_wh2_tail71.composition: WH2 (18) + GSGSG + RADA16 (15) + GSGSG + tail aa 1640-1710 (71) = 114 aa

rada16_wh2_tail91.composition: WH2 (18) + GSGSG + RADA16 (15) + GSGSG + tail aa 1620-1710 (91) = 134 aa

hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail71_x_tmem145.description: Full-construct peptide × TMEM145. Peptide = WH2 (18) + GSGSG + RADA16 (15) + GSGSG + tail. Length 114 aa. Tail: 71 aa GOLD-zone tail (clusters 3+4+5, ipTM 0.63 solo). Tests whether scaffold fusion preserves the 0.63-0.68 isolated-tail binding.
hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail71_x_tmem145.hypothesis_impact: pass -> scaffold fusion preserves TMEM145 binding; half of Phase 3b gate clear. fail -> scaffold/linker contaminates the binding surface; try flexible linker or N-terminal tail placement.

hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail71_x_actin.description: Full-construct peptide × G-actin trimer. Peptide 114 aa. Tail: 71 aa GOLD-zone tail (clusters 3+4+5, ipTM 0.63 solo). Tests whether extended tail (71/91 aa) disturbs WH2 actin-binding from N-terminus.
hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail71_x_actin.success_criteria: ipTM >= 0.50 on any peptide-actin pair (matches Phase 2 0.58-0.59)
hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail71_x_actin.hypothesis_impact: pass -> full dual-interface construct works; advance to Phase 2b Martini3 MD + Phase 2c wet-lab actin-bundling assay. fail -> extended tail disrupts WH2 allosterically; try larger linker between RADA16 and tail.

hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail91_x_tmem145.description: Full-construct peptide × TMEM145. Peptide = WH2 (18) + GSGSG + RADA16 (15) + GSGSG + tail. Length 134 aa. Tail: 91 aa GOLD-zone tail (clusters 2+3+4+5, ipTM 0.68 solo). Tests whether scaffold fusion preserves the 0.63-0.68 isolated-tail binding.
hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail91_x_tmem145.hypothesis_impact: pass -> scaffold fusion preserves TMEM145 binding; half of Phase 3b gate clear. fail -> scaffold/linker contaminates the binding surface; try flexible linker or N-terminal tail placement.

hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail91_x_actin.description: Full-construct peptide × G-actin trimer. Peptide 134 aa. Tail: 91 aa GOLD-zone tail (clusters 2+3+4+5, ipTM 0.68 solo). Tests whether extended tail (71/91 aa) disturbs WH2 actin-binding from N-terminus.
hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail91_x_actin.success_criteria: ipTM >= 0.50 on any peptide-actin pair (matches Phase 2 0.58-0.59)
hydrogel_rada16_wh2_tail91_x_actin.hypothesis_impact: pass -> full dual-interface construct works; advance to Phase 2b Martini3 MD + Phase 2c wet-lab actin-bundling assay. fail -> extended tail disrupts WH2 allosterically; try larger linker between RADA16 and tail.

how_to_submit: AlphaFold Server Import-from-JSON for each file. 4 jobs this batch.

decision_rules.both_pass_both_interfaces: Hypothesis #9 A-tier CONFIRMED. Full construct validated at AF3 level. Advance to Phase 2b Martini3 CG MD dose-response sweep and Phase 2c wet-lab cell-based actin-bundling assay. Select tail91 for max confidence or tail71 for manufacturability (0.05 ipTM cost vs $200/ear cheaper).
decision_rules.tmem145_pass_actin_fail: Extended tail allosterically disturbs WH2 from N-term. Try longer inter-domain linker (GSGSGSGSGS, 10 aa) or alternative WH2 placement (C-terminal instead of N-terminal).
decision_rules.tmem145_fail_actin_pass: Scaffold fusion contaminates TMEM145 binding. Try flexible linker between RADA16 and tail (longer GSGSG variants) or C-terminal scaffold placement.
decision_rules.both_fail: Scaffold architecture doesn't support full dual-interface peptide. Move to Option B (helical mimetic / miniprotein scaffold replacing RADA16).
